title: Half-Life 2: Year Long Alarm

notes: Runs great! Very satisfied. No problems whatsoever, played from start to end.
title: Half-Life 2: Year Long Alarm

notes: Played it and finished without any major issues in one run. Pretty great! Little tip tho, I’ve had to first run the game in -windowed mode before configuring the correct video mode in the settings, as it was rendering only a quarter of the screen of the menu, making me unable to set up it correctly in the main menu, but this seems to be a regular issue with early source engine builds games.
title: Half-Life 2: Year Long Alarm

notes: Played the entire game, was fun, no problems at all!
title: Half-Life 2: Year Long Alarm
